tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-root/pytest-0/popen-gw2/test_x_noenv_disables_env_subs2')

    def test_x_noenv_disables_env_substitution(tmp_path):
        # -x_noenv compares without replacing environment variables.
        # We validate by checking the diff output: with -x we expect $(HOME) to be resolved.
        home = tmp_path / "home"
        home.mkdir()
        cfg_path = tmp_path / "Doxyfile"
        cfg_path.write_text(minimal_cfg("$(HOME)/out", extra="QUIET = YES\n"))
    
        r_env = run_doxygen("-x", str(cfg_path), env={"HOME": str(home)})
        assert r_env.returncode == 0

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-root/pytest-0/popen-gw9/test_documentation_run_generat2')

    @pytest.mark.timeout(5)
    def test_documentation_run_generates_expected_html_files(tmp_path: Path):
        src = tmp_path / "src"
        src.mkdir()
        (src / "foo.h").write_text("""/// Adds two ints.\nint add(int a,int b);\n""", encoding="utf-8")
        (src / "foo.cpp").write_text(
            """#include \"foo.h\"\nint add(int a,int b){return a+b;}\n""",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
    
        # Generate baseline config
        p = run(["-g", "-"], cwd=tmp_path)
        assert p.returncode == 0
        doxyfile = tmp_path / "Doxyfile"
        doxyfile.write_bytes(p.stdout)
    
        # Set minimal options for deterministic output
        def set_tag(text: str, tag: str, value: str) -> str:
            import re
    
            pat = re.compile(rf"^(\s*{re.escape(tag)}\s*=).*$", re.MULTILINE)
            if pat.search(text):
                return pat.sub(rf"\\1 {value}", text)
            return text + f"\n{tag} = {value}\n"
    
        cfg_text = doxyfile.read_text("utf-8", errors="replace")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "OUTPUT_DIRECTORY", "out")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "INPUT", "src")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "RECURSIVE", "YES")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "GENERATE_HTML", "YES")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "GENERATE_LATEX", "NO")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "QUIET", "YES")
        cfg_text = set_tag(cfg_text, "EXTRACT_ALL", "YES")
        doxyfile.write_text(cfg_text, encoding="utf-8")
    
        p2 = run([str(doxyfile)], cwd=tmp_path)
        assert p2.returncode == 0
        # QUIET=YES should keep stdout/stderr empty for normal run
        assert b"Doxygen version used" in p2.stdout
        assert b"finished" in p2.stdout
>       assert p2.stderr == b""
E       AssertionError
